system_description: Multi-tenant case management SaaS for federal civilian agencies. Processes PII including names, contact information, agency-issued identifiers, and case notes for ~250,000 individuals per year. Hosted on AWS GovCloud (FedRAMP High authorized). Multi-tenant; per-tenant logical isolation.

information_types.name: Case Management Records
information_types.description: PII, agency case notes, status, attachments
information_types.rationale: Confidentiality: serious adverse effect if disclosed (privacy, identity theft). Integrity: serious adverse effect if modified (case outcomes, due process). Availability: limited adverse effect (manual workaround for short outages).

information_types.name: Authentication metadata
information_types.description: Login IDs, MFA factor type, last-login timestamp
information_types.rationale: Confidentiality: serious if disclosed in aggregate. Integrity and availability: limited impact.

downstream_consumers: Other federal agencies via FedRAMP Marketplace P-ATO
